name: APP FACTORY — BUILD PWAs AT SCALE
description: Build complete, deployable PWA apps. Each task = 1 app with full GTM package.

tasks.name: SleepMaxx — Sleep Tracker PWA
tasks.description: Sleep timer, quality rating, weekly chart, bedtime checklist, streak tracker, sleep tips, dark mode default. Affiliate: mattress + supplement links. Output: output/sleepmaxx-web/

tasks.name: WalkToUnlock — Step Counter PWA
tasks.description: Step counter (accelerometer), daily goal ring, weekly chart, unlockable rewards at milestones, streak tracker, share card. Affiliate: fitness gear. Output: output/walktounlock-web/

tasks.name: FocusLock — Pomodoro Timer PWA
tasks.description: Pomodoro timer (25/5), session counter, productivity chart, task list, ambient sounds, wake lock, streak tracker. Affiliate: productivity tools. Output: output/focuslock-web/

tasks.name: MealMaxx — Meal Prep Planner PWA
tasks.description: Weekly meal planner, grocery list generator, calorie tracker, recipe library (10 preloaded), macro calculator. Affiliate: kitchen gadgets + supplements. Output: output/mealmaxx-web/

tasks.name: HabitForge — Habit Tracker PWA
tasks.description: Add unlimited habits, daily check-in, streak counter per habit, GitHub-style contribution graph, weekly report, habit suggestions. Affiliate: self-improvement books + courses. Output: output/habitforge-web/
